metadata.title:
ROUNDING Up


JOB DEALERS

CITY AFTER EMPL OYMENT
AGENTS WHO HAVE NEG
LECTED TO TAKE OUT NEG
ESSARY CITY LICENSE.

pages.raw_text:
Neglecting to take out an en-
ployment agents license in obedi-
ence to an order issued over a
week ago by Chief of Police Rice,
employment agents in different
parts of the downtown district are
being arrested by License Inspect
or Gwydir today on charges of con-
Quoting employment offices with
out license.


Immediately after an injunction
procured by the employment
agents against the city, restraining
1t from collecting license fees, was
knocked out in the superior court
over two years ago, every man of
this business in the city was warn
ed in an order from the Office of
the Chief of Police to come
through with their license fee.


G. ID. Jones Of the Empire, c. f.
Carr of the Carr and s. o. Alver-
son of the All Nations employment
agencies had been brought to the
station by the license inspector by
noon today. Each of these were
released by the chief after having
promised to take out license.
Other arrests will follow If the or
der Is not compiled with by tomor-
row.
